experiment: Path 1 pilot — Category-level feedback on FOLIO (pilot only; main NOT run)
config_or_seed_notes: n_pilot=20 candidates. Five conditions: no_feedback / score_only / structured_category / shuffled_category / count_only. Stop rule: pilot decides whether to proceed to main; WEAK_SIGNAL means main is NOT run.

full_numbers.decision_text: Pilot Δ=+0.000 in [0, 0.05). Weak signal. Surface to user: per-aspect channel may not carry signal at category level.

notes: Main run NOT executed because pilot returned WEAK_SIGNAL. Path 1-Hard (different difficulty regime) was run instead — see path1_hard_verified.json.
